title: Fix Type and Division Bugs
bug_descriptions: average_grade: len() does not exist in Hemlock, use grades.length instead
average_grade: sum/length returns float (85.0), need divi() for integer result
split_groups: total/group_size returns float (3.4), need divi() for integer
total_pages: items/per_page returns float (2.3), need divi() for integer, then the +1 logic works correctly
